title: Auto Indoor Plant Watering System
description: Automated watering system triggered by soil moisture sensors. Built to solve the classic problem of killing plants while traveling.

title: Greenhouse + Raspberry Pi Monitor
description: Environmental monitoring system for a greenhouse using a Raspberry Pi — tracking temperature, humidity, and conditions in real time.

title: 2-Month Plant Timelapse
description: Filmed an indoor plant for two months to produce a smooth timelapse. Turns out, a lot of engineering goes into an 8-second video.

title: Rainier NP Reservation Helper
description: A website that visualizes Mt. Rainier campsite and permit availability at a glance, with a calendar-style view. Built because the official recreation.gov UX is painful.

title: Camping Reservation Notification System
description: Automated alerts for campsite availability — notifies when cancellations open up spots. No more obsessively refreshing the page.

title: OME Viewer — iOS & Android
description: End-to-end encrypted email viewer shipped on both iOS and Android. A production mobile app used by real users — later deprecated.

title: Azure Backup & Restore Portal (PITR)
description: User-facing portal for Point In Time Restore on Azure Backup. Enterprise-scale product work shipping UI that real customers depend on for data recovery.

title: Azure Backup & Restore APIs
description: Backend APIs powering Azure Backup and Restore functionality. Systems design and API architecture at enterprise scale.

title: Two US Patents
description: Holds two US patents in the email and messaging space, filed during work on encrypted communication systems.

title: Care Package App
description: App concept for sending digital check-ins and care packages to loved ones — designed to address the feeling of distance and the desire for lightweight, thoughtful connection.

title: AmuseMe — Augmented Museum Experience
description: Augmented reality app concept for enriching museum visits, blending physical artifacts with digital context and interactive layers.

title: Capstone Project
description: Master's capstone project in progress — details coming after June 2026. Check the countdown page for current stress levels.

title: GratApp
description: App concept for daily gratitude reminders — exploring habit-forming design and the intersection of mental wellness and UX.

title: DisappearINK
description: App for offloading thoughts and ideas to free up mental space — content disappears after a set time. The point is release, not record. Strong enough concept to write up as a case study.
